[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111010 6
1 11111000 5
2 00111010 4
3 11101010 5
4 10100101 4
5 01111110 6
6 00101110 4
7 01111010 5

01 10 00110000 2
12 21 00101010 3
23 32 10100000 2
34 43 00100100 2
45 54 00101110 4 match 6
56 65 00101010 3
67 76 00111000 3
70 07 10110000 3

02 20 11100000 3
13 31 00100000 1
24 42 01101010 4
35 53 00100100 2
46 64 01111010 5 match 7
57 75 00101000 2
60 06 01110000 3
71 17 00111000 3

03 30 10100000 2
14 41 00111010 4 match 2
25 52 00101010 3
36 63 00100000 1
47 74 00111000 3
50 05 00100000 1
61 16 00111010 4 match 2
72 27 10101000 3

04 40 01110000 3
15 51 00101010 3
26 62 01101010 4
37 73 10100000 2
[completion]
